mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dm_conversations (id, user1_id, user2_id, unread1, unread2, last_msg_preview, last_msg_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, 0, 0, '', NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dm_conversations WHERE (user1_id = #{a} AND user2_id = #{b}) OR (user1_id = #{b} AND user2_id = #{a}) LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE dm_conversations SET unread1 = CASE WHEN #{recipientId} = #{user1Id} THEN unread1 + 1 ELSE unread1 END, unread2 = CASE WHEN #{recipientId} != #{user1Id} THEN unread2 + 1 ELSE unread2 END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dm_conversations SET unread1 = CASE WHEN #{userId} = #{user1Id} THEN 0 ELSE unread1 END, unread2 = CASE WHEN #{userId} != #{user1Id} THEN 0 ELSE unread2 END WHERE id = #{id}
